name: Golden Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the thawed frozen broccoli in the crockpot.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Spoon the cheddar cheese soup over the top of the broccoli.
4. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon evenly over the mixture.
5. Cover and cook on HIGH setting for 1 hour and 30 minutes, then reduce heat to LOW.
6. Cook for an additional 2 hours at LOW or cook solely at LOW for 4 to 6 hours until the broccoli is tender.
